name: Fresh Produce
description: Organic local fruits and fresh vegetables (Sabji).

name: Dairy & Eggs
description: Aarong dairy liquid milk, organic farm eggs, local ghee, and paneer.

name: Meat & Seafood
description: Padma Hilsha (Ilish), Rupchanda, local mutton, fresh chicken, and Rui fish.

name: Bakery
description: Fresh daily breads, roti, parathas, buns, and local tea cookies.

name: Beverages
description: Sylhet organic teas, fresh coconut water (Daab), and local fruit juices.

name: Pantry Staples
description: Mustard oil (Shorishar Tel), Chinigura rice, Radhuni spices, and lentils (Dal).

name: Snacks & Sweets
description: Local chanachur, premium sweets, raw nuts, and potato chips.

name: Breakfast & Oats
description: Puffed rice (Muri), flat rice (Chira), local Sundarban honey (Modhu), and oats.

name: Frozen Foods
description: Frozen parathas, local samosas, frozen veggies, and ice cream.

name: Household & Clean
description: Cleaning supplies, toilet cleaners, and daily paper essentials.

name: Personal Care
description: Daily bath soaps, natural hair oils, and skincare essentials.

name: Local Farms
description: Specialty items sourced directly from farms in Rajshahi, Jessore & Sylhet.
